description_long: This object is a handheld game controller, resembling the design of an Xbox controller. It features a matte black body with two prominent analog sticks, a directional pad, and four circular action buttons on the right side. The central area includes a round button with a logo, flanked by two smaller buttons. The top edge has two shoulder buttons and two trigger buttons, which are slightly raised. The ergonomic grips are contoured for comfortable hand placement, and the overall build appears robust and designed for frequent handling. The controller is likely constructed from hard plastic with internal electronic components and possibly some metal for structural support.
description: A matte black, ergonomic game controller with analog sticks, a D-pad, and four action buttons, designed for handheld use.
description_view_0: Front view showing all controls: analog sticks, D-pad, action buttons, and central logo button.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the contoured grip and the profile of the shoulder and trigger buttons.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the smooth, unadorned back and the ergonomic shape of the grips.
description_view_3: Right side view showing the right grip, the action buttons, and the side profile of the triggers.
